about.title: Court Bailiff Marcin Starzec
about.story.title: Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock
about.story.content:
With over 15 years of experience as a court bailiff, I specialize in effective and timely enforcement of court orders. My goal is to provide creditors with professional service at every stage of the enforcement process.

A graduate of the Faculty of Law at the University of Warsaw and a long-standing practitioner in enforcement law. Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock uses modern IT systems — CEPIK, EPU, PUE ZUS, ePUAP, and OGNIVO — ensuring efficient and electronic case handling.

Trust experience and integrity — I am your dedicated bailiff and trusted partner in debt recovery.
about.career.title: My Career
about.career.items.0.title: Court Bailiff at the District Court in Otwock
about.career.items.0.company: Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock
about.career.items.0.description: As the founder and head of Bailiff's Office No. IX, I provide professional enforcement services for individual creditors and businesses. I specialize in monetary enforcement, evictions, and judicial correspondence delivery, offering comprehensive case handling.
about.career.items.1.title: Bailiff's Assessor
about.career.items.1.description: At the Warsaw office I gained extensive experience in conducting enforcement proceedings, locating debtor assets, and operating electronic data exchange systems with banks and public institutions. The practical knowledge acquired became the foundation for independent practice.
about.career.items.2.title: Bailiff's Trainee
about.career.items.2.company: Chamber of Court Bailiffs in Warsaw
about.career.items.2.description: I completed my bailiff traineeship under the supervision of experienced court bailiffs, gaining practical knowledge of enforcement law, court procedures, and office management. The traineeship concluded with a very good result on the bailiff examination.
